purpose: 验证 Task 列表页面基础渲染、筛选与分页能力

tasks.title: Upgrade database connection pooling
tasks.description: Migrate from HikariCP 5.x to 6.x to resolve connection leak under high concurrency.

tasks.title: Implement rate limiting for public API
tasks.description: Add token-bucket rate limiting to /api/v2/* endpoints.

tasks.title: Fix timezone handling in scheduler
tasks.description: Scheduled jobs were running at wrong times for non-UTC tenants.

tasks.title: Add observability dashboard for queue depth
tasks.description: Create Grafana dashboard panels showing message queue depth.

tasks.title: Migrate auth tokens to JWT RS256
tasks.description: Replace HS256 symmetric tokens with RS256 asymmetric keys.

tasks.title: Optimize image thumbnail generation
tasks.description: Switch from server-side resizing to edge CDN transformation.

tasks.title: Write migration for user preferences schema
tasks.description: Add nullable JSONB column for user preferences.

tasks.title: Investigate memory leak in worker pods
Decommission legacy v1 API endpoints
tasks.description: Legacy v1 endpoints retired after v2 GA.
